# Scenario: autopilot-run-plain
# Invocation: `bakudo --plain --mode autopilot -p "implement the /chronicle query and add a test"`
# Renderer: plainRenderer, frame.mode=prompt only until the one-shot completes, then exits.
# Autopilot (Phase 3): build-equivalent + auto-approve; bounded by maxAutopilotContinues (here: 4).
# Narration: every low-level event is collapsed by progressMapper (16ms tick), but stage transitions
# still produce one line each. Auto-approvals still create ApprovalRecord entries — shown inline.
# Session:   ses_01HXYZAUTO0101
# Turn:      turn_01HXYZAUTO01T1
# Attempts:  attempt_01HXYZAUTO01A1 (terminal)
# Sandbox:   bakudo-ses_01HXYZAUTO0101-t1-a1
# Exit code: 0

Bakudo  autopilot  session ses_01HXYZ…0101  repo bakudo-abox

You: implement the /chronicle query and add a test
Bakudo: Starting new session in autopilot mode.
Bakudo: Autopilot budget: 4 continues remaining.
Bakudo: Planning turn 1 on the host.
Bakudo: Dispatching sandbox attempt in an ephemeral abox worker.
        task bakudo-ses_01HXYZAUTO0101-t1-a1
Bakudo: Sandbox worker started.
Bakudo: Worker is producing output.
Bakudo: [auto-approve] shell(pnpm test) matched agent_profile rule r_auto_bash_allow.
Bakudo: [auto-approve] write(**) matched agent_profile rule r_auto_write_allow.
Bakudo: [auto-deny]    network(registry.npmjs.org) matched agent_profile rule r_auto_net_deny. Deny wins.
Bakudo: Worker is producing output.
Bakudo: Worker completed. Reviewing result.
Bakudo: Accepted. 4 files changed and targeted tests passed.

Session:   ses_01HXYZAUTO0101
Turn:      turn_01HXYZAUTO01T1
Attempts:  1
Approvals: 2 auto-approved, 1 auto-denied
Outcome:   accepted
Next:      none
Inspect:   bakudo inspect ses_01HXYZAUTO0101 --turn turn_01HXYZAUTO01T1
